notes: Draft provider terms evidence from the 2026-06-20 readiness loop.
This file intentionally keeps provider readiness false until Fuel Path has provider-specific approval, accepted terms, cache limits, attribution wording and commercial consumer-app use evidence.
Current public source review is recorded in PROVIDER-TERMS-REVIEW-2026-06-20.md, but that review is not equivalent to accepted provider terms.
Do not use this file to enable public live-price claims.

VIC access was granted by email on 2026-06-25. Leo confirmed Service Victoria Servo Saver Terms and Acceptable Use policy agreement on 2026-06-27. A redacted evidence note records the conservative 5-minute Fuel Path cache policy, CC BY 4.0 attribution wording, non-endorsement disclaimer and commercial consumer-app acceptable-use constraints.

QLD.evidenceReference: PROVIDER-TERMS-REVIEW-2026-06-20.md QLD Fuel Prices source review 2026-06-20
